name: UBA : User Accessing Account from Anonymous Source
notes: Indicates that a user is accessing internal resources from an anonymous source such as TOR or a VPN.
conditions_text: when the event context is Remote to Local
when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success, BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when Source IP is categorized by X-Force as Anonymization Services with confidence value greater than 85
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Accessing Account from Anonymous Source on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Remote to Local
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success, BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when Source IP is categorized by X-Force as Anonymization Services with confidence value greater than 85
